name: aegislane
description: Guarded autonomous developer loop for OpenCode and Kilo Code.

scripts.check: node --check aegislane/runtime.mjs && node --check aegislane/cli.mjs && node --check .kilo/plugin/aegislane.js && node --check scripts/install-aegislane-global.mjs && node --check scripts/install-aegislane-kilo-global.mjs
scripts.validate: node aegislane/cli.mjs validate-memory && node aegislane/cli.mjs preflight --allow-existing-lock && node aegislane/cli.mjs diff-policy
